allOf.description: Configuration for a syslog logging endpoint.

address.description: A hostname or IPv4 address of the syslog endpoint.

port.description: The port number of the syslog endpoint.

use_tls.description: Whether to use TLS for the syslog connection.

tls_hostname.description: The hostname to verify the server certificate against.

tls_ca_cert.description: A secure certificate to authenticate a server with.

tls_client_cert.description: The client certificate used to make authenticated requests.

tls_client_key.description: The client private key used to make authenticated requests.

token.description: A token to prepend to the syslog message.

message_type.description: How the message should be formatted.
